details.productUrlName: Baral Chief of Compliance Serial Numbered

customAttributes.description:
Instant and sorcery spells you cast cost 1 less to cast.
Whenever a spell or ability you control counters a spell, you may draw a card. If you do, discard a card.
customAttributes.detailNote: This product is a Presale item with an estimated shipping date of 4/21/2023. Please keep in mind card details, including rarity and card name, may change up until release date as information is updated.
customAttributes.flavorText: In light of his zealous defense of Kaladesh, the Consulate was willing to overlook any previous transgressions.
